WITH cust_czk AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
),
cust_2013 AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM cust_czk c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE SUBSTR(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_per_seg AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM cust_2013
    GROUP BY Segment
),
min_customers AS (
    SELECT c2013.Segment, c2013.CustomerID, c2013.total_consumption
    FROM cust_2013 c2013
    JOIN min_per_seg m ON c2013.Segment = m.Segment AND c2013.total_consumption = m.min_consumption
),
seg_avg AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           SUM(total_consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS avg_consumption
    FROM min_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='SME') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM (SELECT 1);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH yearly AS (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4)
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2012,
        MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2013' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2013
    FROM yearly
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        CASE WHEN cons_2013 = 0 THEN NULL
             ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2013 END AS pct_increase
    FROM pivot
    WHERE Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
)
SELECT Segment, pct_increase AS percentage_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM pct)
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM pct);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
